title: Easy Exotic Moroccan Cream Cheese Tagine
description: A briny and crumbly Moroccan dish featuring cream cheese, perfect for a weeknight dinner, with a unique twist of nigiri-shaping and dash-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, chopped green olives, artichoke hearts, sun dried tomatoes, parsley, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
Scoop the mixture into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter, and shape each ball into a small nigiri shape.
Place the shaped cream cheese mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the tagine in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until lightly browned on the outside.
Serve the tagine warm with toasted pita bread slices on the side.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
